title: Property Management Business Opportunity
supportTraining: Support & Training Financial Assistance Provided: Through a 3rd Party Site Selection Assistance: Yes Lease Negotiation Assistance: Yes Recruiting Assistance: Yes Co-Operative Advertising: Yes Training: • Phase 1 - Six weeks of Pre-Startup Training • Phase 2 - Five days of training at our Corporate H
description:
Own Your Own Property Management Business
Property management is a service business. Experience incredible growth and thrive in a fragmented industry and bring it all together. Residential, commercial, short-term rental, and even association management—enabling you to grow and expand into the markets unique to your area’s needs. You’ll become a leading property management provider, with the services and solutions to secure long-term clients and build a successful business.
10 Real Benefits for Our Owners
1. Recession Resistant As long as people are renting properties, they’ll need quality property managers.
2. Recurring Revenue Model when rent is paid you get paid.
3. Small Footprint, Low Overhead 500 square feet of office space is all you need to get started or work from home and don’t start with an office. You decide when you start.
4. Technology-driven to reduced operating costs through automation and streamlined processes. You can manage 100-150 doors without having to hire additional help.
5. No Industry Experience Necessary Comprehensive training covers the industry as well as general information about licensing requirements.
6. Marketing Support customizable materials, proprietary software, and media library
7. Acquire Rentals from other property management business and start with consistent cash flow. The fastest way to grow your property management business is through acquisitions.
8. Vendor partnership program allows you to enjoy partnerships that will help you save money with the tools that you need to grow and expand your business.
9. Receive weekly mentoring and support with calls with a personal coach, live weekly training with leaders each week, and live weekly trainings.
10. Earn for each unit you manage.
America is becoming a renter nation. Over a third of the nation’s households now rent, while home ownership continues to decline. With monthly rental rates increasing, vacancy rates decreasing it a great time to be in the property management busines
